state_explanation: Both forecast and devil's advocate are tracking reality. High-conviction zone (rare). Reality validates both possible paths simultaneously.
convergence_explanation: Forecast and devil's advocate are pointing at similar values. When the lines themselves agree, that's high-conviction signal regardless of which is winning the residual race.
doctrine: When forecast wins the race, the bull thesis was right and is the leveraged direction. When devil's advocate wins, the inverse is the leveraged direction. When both are wrong, models need rebuilding and leverage drops to zero. When both converge with reality (rare), the alignment IS the signal.
